page.content: The data presented in Table 1 encompasses measurements taken on Day 0 and Month 3 (M3) under two dietary conditions: Normal diet and High-fat diet. For body weight (Kg), Day 0 recorded 42.3 ± 1.2 under Normal diet and 40.9 ± 0.9 under High-fat diet, while M3 showed 109.3 ± 3.8 for Normal diet and 129.0 ± 2.9* for High-fat diet. Diuresis (ml/24 h) values indicated 2867 ± 145 for Normal diet and 2567 ± 88 for High-fat diet at Day 0, with M3 results at 3416 ± 487 for Normal diet and 2166 ± 364 for High-fat diet. In terms of creatininemia (μmol/L), Day 0 presented 95 ± 2 for Normal diet and 99 ± 5 for High-fat diet, whereas M3 values were 197 ± 22 for Normal diet and 184 ± 6 for High-fat diet.

page.content: Plasma SOD activity (U/mL) recorded at Day 0 was 10.3 ± 3.9 for Normal diet and 10.9 ± 3.0 for High-fat diet, while M3 results were 37.9 ± 7.4 for Normal diet and 22.2 ± 7.7* for High-fat diet. Table 2 details apoptosis levels across pathways, with Total at 0.22512 (100%), Pathway I at 0.065424 (29.1%), Pathway II at 0.103267 (45.9%), Pathway III at 1.83E-4 (0.08%), and Cross talk effect at 0.0561 (24.9%).
